# Copy functions matching regex into a new sink file.
exec sflit -source big.go -sink small.go -regex '^Filter'
cmp small.go expected_small.go
cmp big.go expected_big.go

-- big.go --
package p

import "fmt"

func FilterA() { fmt.Println("a") }
func Other()   { fmt.Println("o") }
-- expected_big.go --
package p

import "fmt"

func FilterA() { fmt.Println("a") }
func Other()   { fmt.Println("o") }
-- expected_small.go --
package p

import "fmt"

func FilterA() { fmt.Println("a") }
